from flask import Flask, request
from pydantic import BaseModel, validator

app = Flask(__name__)


class TransferRequest(BaseModel):
    sender_id: int
    recipient_id: int
    amount: float
    reference: str = ""

    @validator("amount")
    def amount_must_be_positive(cls, v):
        if v <= 0:
            raise ValueError("Amount must be positive")
        return v

    @validator("recipient_id")
    def cannot_transfer_to_self(cls, v, values):
        if v == values.get("sender_id"):
            raise ValueError("Cannot transfer to self")
        return v


@app.route("/transfer", methods=["POST"])
def transfer_funds():
    req = TransferRequest(**request.json)
    sender = get_account(req.sender_id)
    if sender.balance < req.amount:
        return {"error": "Insufficient funds"}, 400
    execute_transfer(req.sender_id, req.recipient_id, req.amount)
    return {"status": "completed"}
